name: HORIZON BANCORP INC /IN/
business: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides commercial and retail banking services, corporate and individual trust and agency services, and other services incident to banking through its subsidiary Horizon Bank. It operates in northern and central Indiana and southern and central Michigan. The company's primary market areas include various counties in Indiana and Michigan.

exposures.sentence: Financial Technology, or FinTech, start ups are emerging in key banking areas.
Transactions utilizing digital assets, including cryptocurrencies, stablecoins, and other similar assets, have increased substantially over the course of the last several years.

The adoption of artificial intelligence tools, including generative artificial intelligence, machine learning, and similar tools and technologies that collect, aggregate, analyze, or generate data or other materials or content (collectively, AI ), is limited for internal currently, and we expect to continue to adopt such tools as appropriate.
On October 22, 2024, the CFPB adopted a final rule regarding personal financial data rights that is designed to promote open banking.
